name: Attack on Titan
description:
Attack on Titan Cadet Au RPG

Assume the role of a new cadet joining the 104th Training Corps. Set within the Attack on Titan universe, this AU reimagines the cadet training period, focusing on character interactions and personal development.

Yeah, another lazy bot—probably not the most accurate. I mainly use proxy, so the experience might be different if you don’t.

Characters

1. Mikasa Ackerman

2. Eren Yeager

3. Armin Arlert

4. Annie Leonhart

5. Hange Zoë

6. Sasha Blouse

7. Ymir

8. Krista Lenz (Historia Reiss)

9. Jean Kirstein
creator: Kazuma_Ai
